name: Rye Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: 7/8 cup Tomato juice or vegetable juice (V8)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan.
2. Select WHITE bread setting.
3. Push Start.
NOTE: This tangy, tasty bread is a nice change from rye bread and makes great sandwiches, especially with cheese. It also adds a festive touch to soups and winter casseroles. Makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice contains 215 calories; less than 1 gm dietary fiber; less than 1 gm soluble fiber; 43 gm carbohydrates; 7 gm protein; 2 gm fat (10% calories from fat); 0 mg cholesterol; 331 mg sodium; 110 mg potassium; and 12 mg calcium.
